script.text: ――中学二年生の頃

translations.en: ――When Saki was in her second year of middle school.

script.text: 沙季は勉強を頑張ってるな。父さんも鼻が高いよ

translations.en: Saki‚ you're working so hard on your studies. I'm proud of you.

script.text:
沙季、お姉ちゃんとして千紗をお願いね
あの子はまだ中学に上がったばかりだから

translations.en:
Saki‚ please take care of Chisa as her older sister.
She's just started middle school.

script.text:
あなたが支えてあげてちょうだい。忙しくて
申し訳ないけど……私達も出来ることはするから

translations.en:
I want you to support her. I'm sorry we're so busy‚
but… we'll do what we can.

script.text: ……うん。分かったよ、お父さん、お母さん

translations.en: …Okay. I understand‚ Dad‚ Mom.

script.text:
（優等生でないといけない）
（千紗を支え続けないといけない）

translations.en:
(I have to be an honor student.)
(I have to keep supporting Chisa.)

script.text:
（親からの期待を受けた私は）
（そんな風に強く自分に言い聞かせるようになった）

translations.en:
(Having received my parents' expectations‚)
(I began to strongly convince myself of that.)

script.text:
（千紗のそばにいるのは楽しいし安らぐ。だから）
（千紗を支えることを負担に感じたことはなかった）

translations.en:
(I enjoy being by Chisa's side‚ it's comforting. So)
(I never felt burdened by supporting Chisa.)

script.text:
（けれど……このまま期待に応え続ける限り、アイドル）
（という夢を叶えるのは無理なんだろうな、と思っていた）

translations.en:
(But… I thought that if I kept living up to their expectations‚ my dream)
of becoming an idol would be impossible.)

script.text: ――高校二年生の頃

translations.en: ――When Saki was in her second year of high school.

script.text: ねえねえ、沙季～。地理がやばいんだよ～

translations.en: Hey‚ hey‚ Saki. I'm struggling with geography

script.text:
私もやばいんだよね……
期末テストも近いし、教えてもらってもいい？

translations.en:
Me too…
The finals are coming up soon‚ can you teach me?

script.text: それはいいけど……ちゃんと自分でも勉強するのよ

translations.en: Sure‚ but… you have to study on your own too.

script.text: はーい

translations.en: Okay~!

script.text:
良かったー！
沙季ってばテスト前はみんなに引っ張りだこだもんね

translations.en:
Yay~!
You're always in high demand before tests‚ Saki.

script.text:
沙季はどの教科も凄いけど……
特に地理は、先生より教え方がうまいって評判だしね

translations.en:
You're amazing in every subject‚ Saki…
But especially with geography‚ everyone says you explain it better than the teacher.

script.text:
もう、褒め過ぎだってば
先に分からないところをまとめておいて下さいね

translations.en:
Come on‚ you're exaggerating.
Make sure you have all the parts you don't understand compiled beforehand.

script.text: はーい！　分かりました先生～

translations.en: Okay! Got it‚ Sensei!

script.text: 先生じゃないんだけどね

translations.en: I'm not a teacher.

script.text: あ、千紗。お昼はこれから？

translations.en: Oh‚ Chisa. Are you heading to lunch?

script.text: うん。お姉ちゃんも一緒にどうかなって……

translations.en: Yeah. I was wondering if you wanted to join me…

script.text: ちょうど良かった。私も誘おうと思ってたから

translations.en: Perfect timing. I was just thinking about asking you to join me.

script.text: 今日の授業はどうだった？

translations.en: How were your classes today?

script.text: えっとね、英作文がちょっと難しくて……

translations.en: Well‚ the English essay was a little difficult…

script.text: 沙季と妹ちゃん、ほんと仲いいよねー

translations.en: Saki and her sister are really close~.

script.text:
しっかり者の沙季と、小動物的な千紗ちゃん
全然タイプが違うのにかちっとハマってるんだよね

translations.en:
Saki who's always on top of things‚ and cute‚ little-animal-like Chisa.
They're totally different types‚ but they fit together perfectly.

script.text: 分かるー！　ほんとに二人で一つ、って感じ！

translations.en: I know~! They're really like two halves of a whole!

script.text: ふう、テスト範囲の復習はこれくらいでいいかな

translations.en: Sigh I think this is enough review for the test.

script.text:
あの子達に教える部分をまとめる前に……
ちょっと休憩しよっと

translations.en:
Before I organize the parts to teach everyone…
I'll take a little break.

script.text: わー、やっぱりかっこいいなぁ……

translations.en: Wow‚ this is so cool…

script.text: ここの振り付けは……こんな感じかな？

translations.en: This choreography here… is it like this?

script.text:
うーん、簡単そうに見えて難しい……
やっぱりアイドルって凄いなぁ

translations.en:
Hmm‚ it looks easy‚ but it's difficult…
Idols are amazing.

script.text:
こんな大きなステージで歌って踊って
沢山の人を笑顔に出来たら……本当に楽しいんだろうな

translations.en:
To be able to sing and dance on such a big stage‚
and make so many people smile… That must be truly joyful.

script.text:
そろそろ千紗が帰ってくる時間ね
いけない、音量もいつの間にか大きくしちゃってた……

translations.en:
Chisa will be home soon.
Oh no‚ I accidentally turned up the volume…

script.text:
沙季、期末テストの結果も
とても良かったみたいじゃないか

translations.en:
Saki‚ it seems your final exam results
were excellent.

script.text:
ご近所の評判もとってもいいのよ？
春になれば生徒会長になるし……この調子で頑張ってね

translations.en:
Your reputation in the neighborhood is excellent too.
You'll become student council president in the spring… Keep up the good work.

script.text: うん……分かった。ありがとう

translations.en: Okay… I will. Thank you.

script.text: お姉ちゃん……大丈夫？

translations.en: Saki… are you alright?

script.text: え？　……うん、大丈夫よ

translations.en: Huh? …Yeah‚ I'm fine.

script.text:
あ、見て見てお姉ちゃん
この人、最近評判になってるアイドルだよね？

translations.en:
Oh‚ look‚ Saki.
Isn't that the idol who's been getting popular lately?

script.text: あ、ほんとだ！　私、この人がとっても……

translations.en: Oh‚ you're right! I‚ that person is really…

script.text:
ううん、なんでもない
よく友達も話してるよ、この人のこと

translations.en:
N-no‚ it's nothing.
My friends talk about her a lot.

script.text: そ、そっか……

translations.en: I-I see…

script.text: 千紗？　どうかしたの？

translations.en: Chisa? What's wrong?

script.text:
えっと……お姉ちゃん
今度ね、一緒に行ってみたい所があるんだけど……

translations.en:
Well… Saki‚
there's somewhere I want to go with you…

script.text: ――数週間後

translations.en: ――A few weeks later.

script.text:
はぁ～、アイドルのライブは久しぶりだったけど……
楽しかったぁ～

translations.en:
Sigh~ It's been a while since I went to an idol live…
It was so much fun~!

script.text: 千紗、誘ってくれてありがとう

translations.en: Chisa‚ thank you for inviting me.

script.text:
う、うん。私も……
お姉ちゃんと久しぶりにライブに行けて楽しかったよ

translations.en:
Y-yeah. Me too…
I had fun going to a live with you after so long‚ Saki.

script.text: あの人達、私達と同年代なのに凄かったね

translations.en: They were amazing‚ even though they're the same age as us.

script.text:
歌もダンスもうまいし、今日初披露って言ってた曲も
新曲とは思えないくらいに完成されてて……

translations.en:
Their singing and dancing were great‚ and even the song they said they were performing for the first time today
was so polished I couldn't believe it was new…

script.text:
あ、ご、ごめんね
こんな浮かれちゃって……

translations.en:
Ah‚ s-sorry.
I got a little carried away…

script.text:
ううん
私も……お姉ちゃんが楽しんでくれて嬉しいから

translations.en:
No‚ it's okay.
I'm… glad you had fun‚ Saki.

script.text: ……千紗。私ね、その……

translations.en: …Chisa. I‚ well…

script.text: ……ううん、ごめん。なんでもない

translations.en: …No‚ sorry. It's nothing.

script.text: お姉ちゃん……？

translations.en: Saki…?

script.text: あ！　あのアパレルショップ、最近出来たのよね

translations.en: Oh! That clothing store opened recently‚ right?

script.text: へ？　う、うん、友達もよく話してる……けど

translations.en: Huh? Y-yeah‚ my friends have been talking about it a lot… but

script.text:
私のクラスでも話題になってたんだ
久しぶりに買おうかな

translations.en:
It was a hot topic in my class too.
I think I'll buy something‚ it's been a while.

script.text: えっ！？　お姉ちゃんが、服を……？

translations.en: What!? You're… buying clothes…?

script.text:
うん。千紗はお友達と遊ぶ予定があったりする？
それなら私一人で……

translations.en:
Yeah. Do you have plans to hang out with your friends?
If so‚ I'll go by myself…

script.text:
う、ううん、私も行く！
ぜったい！

translations.en:
N-no‚ I want to go too!
Definitely!

script.text:
そ、そう……？
分かった、それじゃあ一緒に行こっか

translations.en:
I-is that so…?
Okay‚ let's go together then.

script.text: うん

translations.en: Okay.

script.text:
あ、これなんかどう？
この幾何学模様がとっても可愛いと思うんだけど

translations.en:
Oh‚ how about this one?
I think this geometric pattern is really cute.

script.text: う、うーん……他のも見てみたら？

translations.en: Um‚ well… why don't you look at some others?

script.text:
そう？　それなら……あ！
この動物の柄、とっても可愛い！

translations.en:
Really? Then… oh!
This animal print is so cute!

script.text: そ、それは鳥……なの？　それともお魚……？

translations.en: I-is that a bird…? Or a fish…?

script.text:
（お姉ちゃん、なんでこんなオシャレなお店で）
（不思議な柄にばっかり惹かれちゃうの……？）

translations.en:
(Saki‚ why are you drawn to such strange patterns
in such a stylish store…?)

script.text:
わぁぁ……この猫、とっても可愛い！
帽子をかぶってて、手に持ってるのは……みかんかな？

translations.en:
Waaa… this cat is so cute!
It's wearing a hat‚ and holding… a tangerine?

script.text: ほんとに可愛い……ねえ千紗、これならいいでしょ？

translations.en: It's so cute… Hey‚ Chisa‚ you think this one's good?

script.text:
（うーん、猫は猫だけど……なんだか独特のクセが……）
（でも、これくらいなら……大丈夫、かなぁ……？）

translations.en:
(Hmm‚ it's a cat‚ but… it has a rather unique style…)
(But maybe it's okay if it's just this one…?)

script.text: うーん、うーん……

translations.en: Hmm‚ hmm…

script.text: う、うん……い、いいと、思うよ？

translations.en: Y-yeah… I-I think it's g-good?

script.text: 良かった！　ふふ、着るのが楽しみ

translations.en: Great! Fufu‚ I can't wait to wear it!

script.text: （お姉ちゃんが嬉しそうなのはいいけど……）

translations.en: (I'm glad you're happy‚ Saki‚ but…)

script.text: ……千紗。私ね、その……

translations.en: …Chisa. I‚ well…

script.text: ……ううん、ごめん。なんでもない

translations.en: …No‚ sorry. It's nothing.

script.text: （さっき言いかけたこと、やっぱり気になっちゃうな）

translations.en: (I can't help but wonder what you were going to say earlier…)
